prompt: Landscape editorial cover illustration for a design-system origin story. A misty Jiangnan lake at dawn transitions naturally into a refined native desktop dashboard made of translucent glass surfaces; blue-mist sky, broad mist-white bands, calm lake teal water, vertical dawn-redwood silhouettes, sparse duckweed green texture, distant gray-blue hills, and one tiny warm dawn-gold edge light. The interface is abstract and believable, compact professional information density, continuous rounded corners, restrained shadows, no nested card clutter. Calm, lucid, low-saturation, premium product design atmosphere, cinematic wide composition, clear depth from nature to digital interface. no text, no letters, no watermark, no brand marks, no platform logos.
